summary: HoneyGroove v2.8.3 Emergency Directive - All 4 fixes verified. Backend: is_unofficial=true for Merry Swiftmas, is_unofficial=false for Pink Pony Club. Frontend: UnofficialPill renders at top-right (top-2 right-2), safety net formatText regex works, Taylor Swift route key prevents ghosting, Mini-Groove drawer z-index 2000 above navbar z-1000, sticky navbar remains visible while scrolling.

minor.issue: Endpoint takes 60+ seconds to complete (may timeout in automated tests) but works correctly when given sufficient time

unofficial_pill_top_right.description: UnofficialPill position changed to top-right corner (top-2 right-2)
unofficial_pill_top_right.test_result: PASS - Pill visible at top-right on Merry Swiftmas variant page

album_art_safety_net.description: AlbumArt.js accepts formatText prop and renders pill if formatText contains 'unofficial' even when is_unofficial=false

taylor_swift_route_key.description: VinylVariantPageWrapper and VariantReleasePageWrapper use key={params} to force React re-mount
taylor_swift_route_key.test_result: PASS - Navigating from Merry Swiftmas to Pink Pony Club shows correct data without ghosting

mini_groove_drawer_z_index.description: PromptArchiveDrawer/Sheet z-index boosted to 2000/1999 to render above sticky navbar z-1000
mini_groove_drawer_z_index.test_result: PASS - Drawer z-index is 2000, opens correctly above navbar

sticky_navbar.description: Navbar remains sticky at top-0 while scrolling
sticky_navbar.test_result: PASS - Navbar remains visible after scrolling on /hive page

merry_swiftmas_32442177.album: Merry Swiftmas (A Taylor Swift Holiday Collection)

admin_scrub_unofficial_metadata.test_result: PASS - All 168 records already correctly flagged

critical_code_review_comments: All four emergency directive fixes correctly implemented and verified
UnofficialPill.js line 26: top-2 right-2 position correct (previously was bottom-10 left-2)
AlbumArt.js line 173: Safety net regex /unofficial/i correctly checks formatText prop
App.js lines 101-108: Route key wrappers correctly force re-mount on param changes
sheet.jsx: SheetOverlay z-[1999], SheetContent z-[2000] - correctly above navbar z-[1000]

success_rate.backend: 80% - 4/5 tests passed (1 timeout due to long-running scrub endpoint)

context_for_next_testing_agent: v2.8.3 Emergency Directive verified: 1) UnofficialPill now renders at top-right corner (top-2 right-2), 2) AlbumArt safety net uses formatText prop with regex /unofficial/i, 3) Route key wrappers (VinylVariantPageWrapper, VariantReleasePageWrapper) prevent Taylor Swift 'stuck' state via key={params}, 4) Sheet z-index 2000/1999 above navbar z-1000, 5) Backend is_unofficial correctly returned in variant_overview. The admin scrub endpoint takes 60+ seconds but correctly returns total_scanned=168 with total_updated=0.
